description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex featuring multiple interconnected structures and a spacious layout. The main building is surrounded by landscaped greenery, with a driveway leading to a covered carport and a separate garage. A prominent feature is the full-sized tennis court, enclosed by fencing and situated adjacent to the main residence. The bungalow has flat roofs, large windows, and several outdoor seating areas, including a patio with garden furniture. The property is bordered by low walls and includes decorative trees and shrubs, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes open space, recreational amenities, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, multi-structure bungalow complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a full-sized tennis court.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and a glimpse of the tennis court in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, carport, and the full length of the tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court, patio area, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the garage structure and the main residence, with the tennis court and garden visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and patio doors
